hero.title: Premium Pergola & Glass Solutions
hero.subtitle: Transform your home with our premium glass solutions. From elegant glass walls to modern shading systems, we bring innovation and quality to every project.

livingSpaces.label: Living Spaces
livingSpaces.title: Comfortable living spaces for every season
livingSpaces.description: We design living spaces that keep you warm in winter and cool in summer, transforming your home into an efficient and comfortable space year-round.

winterGardens.label: Winter Gardens
winterGardens.title: Winter Gardens: Enjoy Every Season
winterGardens.description: Expand your living space with our custom-designed winter gardens. Experience the beauty of nature year-round in a comfortable and elegant environment, carefully crafted by ABA Pergola.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Our Expertise in Pergola Solutions
about.description: ABA Pergola Systems combines years of experience with modern technology and attention to detail to deliver superior shading solutions. We use aluminium and high-quality materials for our bioclimatic pergolas that provide year-round comfort.

strengths.label: Strengths
strengths.title: Why Choose ABA Pergola
strengths.description: Quality, precision and professionalism in every project.
strengths.item1Desc: Every project is tailored to your space with professional measurements and custom designs.
strengths.item2Desc: We control the entire production process to guarantee the highest quality of materials and workmanship.
strengths.item3Desc: Our certified team ensures efficient and careful installation with minimal disruption to your activities.

engineering.label: Engineering & Design
engineering.title: Precision in Pergola Design and Engineering
engineering.description: Our pergolas are the product of meticulous engineering and sophisticated design. We apply advanced techniques and industry standards to ensure superior durability, functionality and aesthetics.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Our Projects
portfolio.description: Discover the diversity and quality of our work.

sistem-ghilotina.label: Guillotine System
sistem-ghilotina.title: Enjoy the uninterrupted view and manage the seasons as you wish
sistem-ghilotina.desc: We transform outdoor spaces into relaxation zones with our guillotine glass systems. Thanks to glass panels that move vertically, you get both an elegant railing for balconies and terraces, and the comfort of a fully enclosed winter garden.
sistem-ghilotina.whyTitle: Why choose the guillotine glass system?
sistem-ghilotina.f1Desc: Regulate airflow by stopping the panels at any level via remote control.
sistem-ghilotina.f2Desc: Protect yourself from cold and noise with double-glazed options.
sistem-ghilotina.f3Desc: Provides a safe barrier for children and pets.
sistem-ghilotina.f4Desc: Make no compromises with a modern and minimalist design.

gradina-de-iarna.label: Winter Garden
gradina-de-iarna.title: The calm of the garden, inside your home
gradina-de-iarna.desc: With our winter garden systems, we bring the tranquility of your garden indoors, even on the coldest days. In these special spaces where aesthetic design meets high insulation technology, enjoy your coffee while watching the snow fall. We create an elegant refuge that adds value to your home and breathes in every season. Remove the barriers between you and nature.
gradina-de-iarna.f1Desc: A warm environment in winter and cool in summer thanks to double-glazed systems.
gradina-de-iarna.f2Desc: Water and snow resistant structures, with options for transparent, tinted glass or panels.
gradina-de-iarna.f3Desc: Unified appearance, compatible with our sliding and guillotine glass systems.
gradina-de-iarna.f4Desc: Color and profile options adapted to your home's architecture.

pergola-retractabila.label: Retractable Pergola
pergola-retractabila.title: Refinement and Comfort Without Compromise
pergola-retractabila.desc: A touch of modernity that redefines the value of your living space. The essence of four-season comfort comes to life in your garden. Our pergola systems, defined by a contemporary design vision, transform any outdoor space from a simple relaxation area into an aesthetic and ultra-functional living hub. The membrane (awning fabric) is made from multi-layer PVC, fire-resistant and waterproof, designed to withstand extreme temperatures and strong mechanical stress. Make the most of nature at any time of year, under the protection of an intelligent and durable structure.
pergola-retractabila.f1Desc: Extend your relaxation moments even after sunset. The LED lighting system is discreetly integrated into the structure, providing a warm ambiance and a spectacular visual effect.
pergola-retractabila.f2Desc: Designed to be perfectly compatible with sliding or guillotine glass systems, our pergolas allow complete enclosure of the space, offering total protection against wind and bad weather.
pergola-retractabila.f3Desc: Enjoy the view while being protected from sun, rain or snow, relying on a robust structure built to withstand the test of time.
pergola-retractabila.f4Desc: Made from multi-layer PVC, fire-resistant and waterproof, designed to withstand extreme temperatures and strong mechanical stress.

sistem-bioclimatic.label: Bioclimatic
sistem-bioclimatic.title: Intelligent louvres, impeccable comfort
sistem-bioclimatic.desc: Bioclimatic pergola systems adapt your outdoor space to any weather conditions, thanks to axially rotating mobile aluminium panels. You can easily open the louvres to ensure natural ventilation or close them completely to create a protected, sealed space. The most advanced outdoor solution, where modern technology meets comfort.
sistem-bioclimatic.f1Desc: Adjust the angle of the louvres to direct sunlight and evacuate hot air.
sistem-bioclimatic.f2Desc: High-strength aluminium structure resistant to heavy snow and strong winds.
sistem-bioclimatic.f3Desc: Built-in lighting options to create an elegant atmosphere in the evening.
sistem-bioclimatic.f4Desc: Manage the entire system with a simple remote control or smartphone app.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive Solutions for Outdoor Spaces
services.description: From retractable pergolas to full winter gardens, we offer premium solutions tailored to your needs.
services.item1Desc: Elegant, retractable covering systems for residential and commercial terraces.
services.item2Desc: Custom glass and aluminium extensions that transform your terrace into a year-round living space.
services.item3Desc: Rotating louvres that control light and ventilation, creating the perfect microclimate.
services.item4Desc: Automatic glass closure systems for maximum protection and comfort.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Got questions?
faq.q1: What materials do you use for pergolas?
faq.a1: We use only high-quality extruded aluminium and tempered glass, resistant to corrosion and extreme weather conditions.
faq.a2: Yes, our certified team provides professional installation throughout Romania and Bulgaria.
faq.a3: We offer a 5-year warranty on the structure and 2 years on mechanical and electrical components.
faq.a4: Absolutely! Every project is custom-designed and manufactured to your exact specifications and space.
faq.q5: What is the delivery and installation time?
faq.a5: The standard timeframe is 4-8 weeks from order confirmation, depending on the project's complexity.
